hooks.command: npm run build 2>&1 && npm run test 2>&1

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm[[:space:]]+-rf|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+--force|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard|DROP[[:space:]]+TABLE|sk-ant-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{20,}|[0-9]{8,}:[A-Za-z0-9_-]{30,}'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험 명령어 또는 시크릿 패턴 감지' >&2; exit 1; fi
